LowPassFilter2p.notes: Direct Form II biquad IIR Butterworth filter. 13 theorems: passthrough, linearity, zero-state, delay updates, Butterworth symmetry, DC steady state, DC gain=1. Informal spec written run 123.

BlockIntegralTrap.notes: Trapezoidal integrator with symmetric saturation. 16 theorems: saturation bounds, monotonicity, fold invariance, anti-windup boundary. Correspondence reviewed run 123.
